channel.title: Agent Lab Journal
channel.description: Practical notes on reliable AI agents, automation and safety.

item.title: Agent Lab Journal: practical AI agent engineering
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: English entry point for practical notes on reliable AI agents, automation, memory and safety.
item.content:encoded:
English entry point for Agent Lab Journal.

Read the journal

item.title: How we identified unnecessary AI agent costs
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: How to identify repeated AI agent requests, attribute costs to tasks, and set limits: a practical case study using an event log, deduplication, and result verification.
item.content:encoded:
How to identify repeated AI agent requests, attribute costs to tasks, and set limits: a practical case study using an event log, deduplication, and result verification.

Read the article

item.title: How an Agent Reviews a Repository Before Adoption
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: A repeatable advanced workflow for checking an external repository when a useful-looking library has no proven compatibility with your project.
item.content:encoded:
A repeatable advanced workflow for checking an external repository when a useful-looking library has no proven compatibility with your project.

Read the article

item.title: How We Added Confirmation Before an Agent Sends a Message
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: A practical case study for building a safe approval loop that prevents an AI agent from automatically sending messages on behalf of its owner.
item.content:encoded:
A practical case study for building a safe approval loop that prevents an AI agent from automatically sending messages on behalf of its owner.

Read the article

item.title: How We Built an Autonomous AI Article Publication Pipeline
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: How to build an autonomous AI article publication pipeline: rules, glossary, llms.txt, and an automated publication gate.
item.content:encoded:
How to build an autonomous AI article publication pipeline: rules, glossary, llms.txt, and an automated publication gate.

Read the article

item.title: How We Taught Our Codex Workflow Anthropic's Principles
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: How we reshaped our Codex operating system after studying Anthropic courses: context, verification, hooks, skills, and safer automation.
item.content:encoded:
How we reshaped our Codex operating system after studying Anthropic courses: context, verification, hooks, skills, and safer automation.

Read the article

item.title: How We Are Building an AI System That Improves Itself
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: How we are building an AI system with memory, routing, testing, and action controls.
item.content:encoded:
How we are building an AI system with memory, routing, testing, and action controls.

Read the article

item.title: Langfuse vs Phoenix vs Opik: comparing three AI agent observability tools
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: A reproducible comparison of Langfuse, Phoenix, and Opik for tracing an AI agent, diagnosing failures, measuring latency, estimating run cost, and debugging locally.
item.content:encoded:
A reproducible comparison of Langfuse, Phoenix, and Opik for tracing an AI agent, diagnosing failures, measuring latency, estimating run cost, and debugging locally.

Read the article

item.title: Controlling AI Agents in deco Studio: Tools, Permissions, and Cost
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: An advanced, repeatable lab for running deco Studio locally, connecting an MCP tool, enforcing least-privilege access, logging calls, and measuring AI-agent tokens, latency, and cost.
item.content:encoded:
An advanced, repeatable lab for running deco Studio locally, connecting an MCP tool, enforcing least-privilege access, logging calls, and measuring AI-agent tokens, latency, and cost.

Read the article

item.title: Local RAG in Dify: Build a Workflow and Test Answer Quality
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: A reproducible, practical guide to deploying Dify locally, building a RAG workflow over private documents, and comparing answer quality across retrieval settings.
item.content:encoded:
A reproducible, practical guide to deploying Dify locally, building a RAG workflow over private documents, and comparing answer quality across retrieval settings.

Read the article

item.title: Protecting AI Agent Tools with the Doberman MCP Proxy
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: Build and benchmark a Doberman MCP gateway that allows safe tool calls, requires approval for sensitive actions, blocks destructive commands and secret exfiltration, and measures ASR and FPR before and after protection.
item.content:encoded:
Build and benchmark a Doberman MCP gateway that allows safe tool calls, requires approval for sensitive actions, blocks destructive commands and secret exfiltration, and measures ASR and FPR before and after protection.

Read the article

item.title: How to Give an Agent Autonomy Without Losing Control
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: How to give an agent autonomy without losing control. A practical guide with result verification.
item.content:encoded:
How to give an agent autonomy without losing control. A practical guide with result verification.

item.title: Why an AI agent keeps asking about things it already knows
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: Why an AI agent keeps asking about things it already knows. A practical guide with a result check.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: How to Tell Whether an AI Agent Has Actually Improved Rather Than Merely Sounding More Confident
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: How to tell whether an AI agent has actually improved rather than merely sounding more confident. A practical guide with outcome verification.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Personal AI Agent on a VPS: Telegram, Memory, and Action Controls

item.title: Show us one process that takes too much time
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: Show us one repetitive business process and we will scope an AI agent pilot.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Hidden Prompt Injection: Hacking a Browser Agent and Testing Its Defenses
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: Build a reproducible local lab that exposes a browser agent to hidden prompt injection, records its actions, and compares behavior before and after defensive restrictions.
item.content:encoded:
Build a reproducible local lab that exposes a browser agent to hidden prompt injection, records its actions, and compares behavior before and after defensive restrictions.

Read the article

item.title: waoowaoo AI video pipeline: from text to a voiced video
item.author: journal@agentlabjournal.online (Agent Lab Journal)
item.description: A reproducible 90-minute test of the local waoowaoo AI video pipeline: turn a short script into characters, scenes, a storyboard, voiced clips, and a verified final video.
item.content:encoded:
A reproducible 90-minute test of the local waoowaoo AI video pipeline: turn a short script into characters, scenes, a storyboard, voiced clips, and a verified final video.
